    Map Elements (titles, legends)




    Map Styles and Backgrounds

    Markers, Site Properties, and Rules

    Marker Rules allow you to use different marker colors and types to indicate different site attributes. Selecting site property “None” uses the same marker for all sites. Rules are applied in numeric order.

    Switching properties clears all rules.

    Site Property:
    RuleValueMarker
    • X
    • white
    • black
    • #FF0015
    • #FFB400
    • #FFFB00
    • #00D300
    • #6682FF
    • #B000C7
